RT by @DXBMediaOffice: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: Today, we announced the establishment of ‘DEWA International’, an independent subsidiary wholly owned by DEWA, aimed at developing conventional and clean energy projects worldwide and exporting Dubai’s successful energy and water infrastructure model to global markets. Thanks to the vision and directives of HH Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, Dubai has become a global model for achievement and accelerated development. Through its world-class infrastructure, particularly in the energy & water sectors, Dubai has firmly established itself as a leading international benchmark.
